narrative:
Precinct Washington B (precinct in Muskingum County) has 772 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.3 percentage points.
